svg.text: React Contexts: StoryThemeContext (day→theme map) | ThemeContext (UI dark/light/warm)
Screenshot Themes: Shiny Purple | Mango Juice | Ocean Breeze | Forest Glow | Sunset Vibes — 1080×1080 gradient cards
STORY → screenshot download (manual upload) | POST → auto-publish to IG
BulkScheduleModal — schedule multiple tweets at once
API LAYER — Next.js API Routes (Vercel Serverless)
WORKER PROCESS — Railway (Docker) — Separate from Web App
scheduler.ts — BullMQ Worker (concurrency: 2, rate limit: 5 jobs/min)
Status: PENDING → PROCESSING → COMPLETED (or FAILED → retry up to 3×)
tokenRefresh.ts — Daily cron: refreshes Instagram tokens expiring within 7 days
